title: Shawn <> Novus AI
summary: Novus AI presented a live meeting recording and transcription bot that captures action items and dates in real-time, with the ability to remove the bot for confidential discussions. The team agreed on a POC go-live date of April 24th and an MVP date of May 25th, with a follow-up meeting scheduled for April 22nd.
transcript_text:

So now whatever we talk , whatever we speak , whatever dates we input , whatever action items we input , the bot is recording it live and as soon as the meeting is meeting ends , or if you want to talk something confidential and don't want the board to listen . You can just kick the bot out and it will uh start producing summary tran script based on where it left a meeting . So that really really likes to say any action item or any dates or anything like that .
